message:
test(ftui-widgets): improve scorer.rs test coverage (bd-z1c65)

Add 54 tests covering: MatchType descriptions/ordering, EvidenceDescription
Display variants, EvidenceLedger direct methods (combined_bayes_factor,
prior_odds, posterior_probability edge cases), BayesianScorer::fast() path,
Unicode matching, score_with_query_lower/lowered_title, tag matching edge
cases, count_word_boundaries/total_gap, ConformalRanker custom thresholds,
IncrementalScorer::with_scorer/Default/score_corpus_with_lowered, and
word boundary separators.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2b82","title":"Text Effects: Demo Showcase Integration","description":"## Background
The visual_effects screen needs to showcase all new text effects in an impressive, navigable demo that serves as both documentation and a selling point for FrankenTUI.

## Implementation

### Navigation Structure
```
Tab 1: Gradients    - Horizontal, Vertical, Diagonal, Radial, Animated
Tab 2: Animations   - Wave, Bounce, Shake, Cascade, Pulse, Breathing
Tab 3: Typography   - Shadow, Glow, Outline, Mirror, ASCII Art
Tab 4: Special FX   - Glitch, Chromatic, Scanline, Particle, Matrix
Tab 5: Presets      - All 10 presets with descriptions
Tab 6: Combinations - User can toggle effects on/off
```

### Key Features
1. Spacebar cycles through effects within current tab
2. TransitionOverlay shows effect name + description on switch
3. Number keys 1-6 switch tabs
4. 'e' key toggles easing comparison mode
5. 'c' key enters combination builder

### Visual Layout
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [Gradients] [Animations] [Typography] ...    │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                             │
│         EFFECT DEMO TEXT                    │
│         (with current effect)               │
│                                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Effect: Rainbow Gradient                    │
│ Speed: 0.3  │  Easing: EaseInOut           │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Space: next │ ←→: adjust │ Tab: category   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### ASCII Art Header
Use AsciiArtText with Block style for 'EFFECTS' title, animated gradient.

## Files
- crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/visual_effects.rs

## Testing

### Unit Tests
- test_tab_navigation: Keys switch tabs correctly
- test_effect_cycling: Spacebar advances effect index
- test_transition_triggers: Effect change starts transition

### E2E Tests (in scripts/demo_showcase_e2e.sh)
```bash
# Navigate through all tabs and effects
echo 'Testing visual effects screen navigation...'
# Send key sequence: 1,space,space,2,space,3...
# Verify no panics, all effects render
```

## Acceptance
- All 6 tabs implemented
- All effects showcased
- Smooth transitions between effects
- No rendering glitches
- Help text updated with new keybindings

## Acceptance Criteria
- Deliver the behavior implied by the title: Text Effects: Demo Showcase Integration
- Alien Artifact: define invariants + failure modes; if heuristics exist, specify an explainable decision rule (evidence ledger / Bayes factors where applicable)
- Extreme Optimization: baseline -> profile -> opportunity matrix; for each perf change include an isomorphism proof + golden output checksums
- Unit tests: happy path + edge cases + regression fixtures; add property tests for core invariants where applicable
- E2E: scripts with verbose JSONL logging (env, capabilities, timings, seed, checksums) + deterministic mode

 {"id":"bd-yzu","title":"Implement Flex layout with constraint solving","description":"PHASE 5 - FLEX LAYOUT

## Background
Flex layout provides 1D constraint-based sizing for rows/columns. Core layout primitive that most complex layouts build upon. Based on CSS Flexbox concepts adapted for terminal grid.

## Technical Requirements
- Flex struct with direction (Row/Column)
- Constraint types:
  - Fixed(u16): exact size
  - Percent(f32): percentage of parent
  - Min(u16): minimum size, grow to fill
  - Max(u16): maximum size, shrink to fit
  - Ratio(u16, u16): proportional sharing
- Constraint solving algorithm:
  1. Allocate Fixed constraints first
  2. Calculate Percent based on remaining space
  3. Distribute remainder to Min/Ratio proportionally
  4. Clamp Max constraints
- Gap/spacing between items
- Cross-axis alignment: Start, Center, End, Stretch

## Design Rationale
Flex is simpler than full 2D grid but handles 90% of TUI layouts. Constraint types mirror Ratatui's proven model. Solving algorithm is deterministic for predictable layouts.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Flex struct with direction and items
- [ ] Full constraint type enum
- [ ] Deterministic constraint solver
- [ ] Gap/margin support
- [ ] Cross-axis alignment
- [ ] Nested Flex support
- [ ] Property tests for constraint invariants
- [ ] Edge case handling (overflow, zero space)

## Performance Budget
- Layout solve for 20 items: < 100µs
- No allocations for typical layouts (stack buffer)

## Location: ftui-layout crate","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-31T22:19:03.472657582Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T18:51:38.776239643Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T18:51:38.776220367Z","close_reason":"Implemented Flex layout with full constraint solving (Fixed, Percentage, Min, Max, Ratio), gap/margin support, all alignment modes (Start, Center, End, SpaceBetween, SpaceAround), nested Flex support.  {"id":"bd-z8q6","title":"Migrate simple buffer-only widgets to Frame (Category A)","description":"## Scope

Migrate all Category A widgets - those that only write to buffer and don't need
any special Frame features.

## Migration Pattern

For each widget:

1. Change signature:
   ```rust
   // FROM:
   fn render(&self, area: Rect, buf: &mut Buffer) {
   
   // TO:
   fn render(&self, area: Rect, frame: &mut Frame) {
   ```

2. Replace all `buf` references with `frame.buffer`:
   ```rust
   // FROM:
   buf.get_mut(x, y)
   
   // TO:
   frame.buffer.get_mut(x, y)
   ```

3. Or use a local binding for cleaner code:
   ```rust
   fn render(&self, area: Rect, frame: &mut Frame) {
       let buf = &mut frame.buffer;
       // ... rest of code unchanged
   }
   ```

## Widgets Expected in This Category

Based on functionality (to be confirmed by audit):
- Block (borders, title)
- Rule (horizontal/vertical lines)
- Scrollbar (decorative)
- Spinner (animation frames)
- Paragraph (text display)
- Progress (progress bars)

## Important

- DO NOT change any widget behavior
- DO NOT add new Frame features unless explicitly needed
- This is a MECHANICAL migration only
- If a widget turns out to need Frame features, move it to appropriate category

## Verification

After migration:
- `cargo check -p ftui-widgets` must pass
- All existing tests must pass","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T23:21:57.095832290Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T23:25:44.437859214Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T23:25:44.437828416Z","close_reason":"All Category A widgets migrated to Frame: Block, Rule, Scrollbar, Spinner, Paragraph, Progress, Panel, Padding, List, Table, StatusLine, ErrorBoundary, CachedWidget, ConstraintOverlay, DebugOverlay. cargo test passes.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-z8q6","depends_on_id":"bd-2ryo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:18Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-z8q6","depends_on_id":"bd-3coz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:18Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
